endpoints.name: oauth2_authorize
endpoints.description:
Allows to get authorization code needed for token creation

_\*after login to your Worksection account and approval page confirmation, you will be forwarded to specified Redirect URI with authorization code parameter (code is valid for 10 minutes)_

authentication.note: No authentication required for OAuth2 endpoints

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Client ID Your Worksection application unique ID

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Redirect URI Must meet the requirements of the OAuth2 standard and use the HTTPS protocol

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Random text string Will be included in the response to your application at the end of the OAuth stream The main purpose is to prevent CSRF requests from being spoofed

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: OAuth permissions, available values (can be specified with commas): projects_read|projects_write| tasks_read|tasks_write|costs_read|costs_write|tags_read|tags_write|comments_read|comments_write|files_read| files_write|users_read|users_write|contacts_read|contacts_write|administrative Defines which data in the Worksection your application will have access to

parameters.name: response_type
parameters.description: Response type, possible value: code _code_ - returns the authorization code

endpoints.name: oauth2_token
endpoints.description:
Returns access and refresh tokens

_\*access_token is valid for 24 hours, refresh_token – 1 month_

authentication.note: No authentication required for OAuth2 endpoints

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Client ID Your Worksection application unique ID

parameters.name: client_secret
parameters.description: Client Secret Your Worksection application secret string

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Redirect URI Must meet the requirements of the OAuth2 standard and use the HTTPS protocol

parameters.name: grant_type
parameters.description: OAuth grant type, possible value: authorization_code

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: Authorization code Can be obrained through _oauth2_authorize_ method

endpoints.name: oauth2_refresh
endpoints.description:
Returns new access and refresh tokens

\*used when access token is about to expire or already expired  
_\*access_token is valid for 24 hours, refresh_token – 1 month_

authentication.note: No authentication required for OAuth2 endpoints

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Client ID Your Worksection application unique ID

parameters.name: client_secret
parameters.description: Client Secret Your Worksection application secret string

parameters.name: refresh_token
parameters.description: Refresh token Can be obtained through _oauth2_token_ method

parameters.name: grant_type
parameters.description: OAuth grant type, possible value: refresh_token

endpoints.name: oauth2_resource
endpoints.description: Returns authorized user's (oauth2) info

authentication.note: No authentication required for OAuth2 endpoints

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: Client ID Your Worksection application unique ID

parameters.name: client_secret
parameters.description: Client Secret Your Worksection application secret string

parameters.name: access_token
parameters.description: Access token Can be obtained through _oauth2_token_ method

endpoints.name: me
endpoints.description:
Returns info about authorized user (oauth2)

**!! User method (only for access token) !!**

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

endpoints.name: get_users
endpoints.description: Returns account users info

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

Invites new account user

parameters.name: first_name
parameters.description: User first name

parameters.name: last_name
parameters.description: User last name

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: User position

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Team name

parameters.name: department
parameters.description: Department name

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: User role, possible values: user|guest|reader

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Team name

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Team type (0 by default), possible values: 1|0 _1_ - external client team _0_ - your company team

endpoints.name: subscribe
endpoints.description:
Subscribes user to selected task

_\*task subscribers list can be obtained through 'get_task' method with 'extra=subscribers' parameter_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: email_user
parameters.description: User email

endpoints.name: unsubscribe
endpoints.description:
Unsubscribes user from selected task

_\*task subscribers list can be obtained through 'get_task' method with 'extra=subscribers' parameter_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: email_user
parameters.description: User email

endpoints.name: get_projects
endpoints.description: Returns all projects info

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Project state, possible values: active|pending|archive _active_ - active projects _pending_ - sleeping projects (muted, so don't send notifications) _archive_ - archived projects

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Additional project info, possible values (can be specified with commas): text|options|users _text_ or _html_ - description in text or html format _options_ - project restriction options _users_ - project team members

endpoints.name: get_project
endpoints.description: Returns selected project info

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Additional project info, possible values (can be specified with commas): text|options|users _text_ or _html_ - description in text or html format _options_ - project restriction options _users_ - project team members

data.name: Performance improvement
data.text: Inner project for company KPI improvement

endpoints.name: post_project
endpoints.description: Creates project _\*allows files attaching to project description (see_ [details](https://worksection.com/en/faq/api-files.html#q1691)_)_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Project name

parameters.name: email_user_from
parameters.description: Project author email

parameters.name: email_manager
parameters.description: Project manager email

parameters.name: email_user_to
parameters.description: User email of a default task executive, possible values: ANY|NOONE _ANY_ - for "Anyone" _NOONE_ - for "Executive isn't assigned"

parameters.name: members
parameters.description: Project member emails separated by commas

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Project description

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: Folder name, where the project will be located

parameters.name: datestart
parameters.description: Start date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: dateend
parameters.description: Due date or end date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: max_time
parameters.description: Time estimates

parameters.name: max_money
parameters.description: Financial estimates

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Project tags separated by commas You can specify names (if they are unique) or their IDs (can be obtained through _get_project_tags_ method)

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Project restriction options info, possible value: options

parameters.name: options.allow_close
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Assignee can mark task as done, possible values: 1|0 _1_ - enable _0_ - disable

parameters.name: options.allow_give
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Assignee can transfer the responsibility, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.allow_term
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Assignee can change the task terms, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.allow_limit
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Assignee can change the estimates, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.require_term
parameters.description: Project restriction option – New task requires terms, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.require_tag
parameters.description: Project restriction option – New task requires stages and labels, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.require_limit
parameters.description: Project restriction option – New task requires estimates, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.require_hidden
parameters.description: Project restriction option – New task requires visibility, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.deny_comments_edit
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Users are not permitted to edit and delete comments, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.deny_task_edit
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Users are not permitted to edit and delete tasks, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.deny_task_delete
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Users are not permitted to delete tasks, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.time_require
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Mark as done with costs only, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.time_today
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Adding costs for today only, possible values: 1|0

parameters.name: options.timer_only
parameters.description: Project restriction option – Adding costs from timer only, possible values: 1|0

schema.message: Only one parameter (options.time_require or options.time_today or options.timer_only) can be set as 1.

endpoints.name: get_events
endpoints.description: Returns performed actions info in all or selected projects within selected time period _\*info on who made changes, what changed and when_ **!! better use webhooks instead (see** [details](https://worksection.com/en/faq/webhooks.html)**) !!**

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time period, possible values: 1m..360m|1h..72h|1d..30d _1m..360m_ - in minutes _1h..72h_ - in hours _1d..30d_ - in days

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: Project ID

new.text: Today we have a meetup. Please, prepare your department results.

endpoints.name: get_all_tasks
endpoints.description:
Returns all incomplete and completed tasks of all projects

_\*except tasks with delayed publication  
\*subtasks can be returned with extra=subtasks parameter_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Incomplete tasks, possible value: active Сompleted tasks filtering is not available

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Additional task info, possible values (can be specified with commas): text|files|comments|relations|subtasks|archive _text_ or _html_ - description in text or html format _files_ - attached files info (in task description) _comments_ - five last comments _relations_ - dependencies with other tasks _subtasks_ - list of subtasks (in 'child' dataset) _archive_ - tasks of archived projects

comments.text: Need your help with first section

endpoints.name: get_tasks
endpoints.description:
Returns all incomplete and completed tasks of selected project

_\*except tasks with delayed publication  
\*subtasks can be returned with extra=subtasks parameter_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Incomplete tasks, possible value: active Сompleted tasks filtering is not available

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Additional task info, possible values (can be specified with commas): text|files|comments|relations|subtasks|subscribers _text_ or _html_ - description in text or html format _files_ - attached files info (in task description) _comments_ - five last comments _relations_ - dependencies with other tasks _subtasks_ - list of subtasks (in 'child' dataset) _subscribers_ - subscribers list with user info

comments.text: Need your help with first section

endpoints.name: get_task
endpoints.description:
Returns selected incomplete or completed (sub)task

_\*except (sub)tasks with delayed publication  
\*task along with its subtasks can be returned with extra=subtasks parameter_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Incomplete subtasks (if using extra=subtasks parameter), possible value: active Сompleted subtasks filtering is not available

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Additional task info, possible values (can be specified with commas): text|files|comments|relations|subtasks|subscribers _text_ or _html_ - description in text or html format _files_ - attached files info (in task description) _comments_ - five last comments _relations_ - dependencies with other tasks _subtasks_ - list of subtasks (in 'child' dataset) _subscribers_ - subscribers list with user info

comments.text: Need your help with first section

endpoints.name: post_task
endpoints.description: Creates (sub)task in selected project _\*allows files attaching to (sub)task description (see_ [details](https://worksection.com/en/faq/api-files.html#q1691)_)_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: Project ID

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Task name

parameters.name: id_parent
parameters.description: Parent task ID for creating subtask

parameters.name: email_user_from
parameters.description: Task author email (will be set automatically if using access token)

parameters.name: email_user_to
parameters.description: Task executive email, possible values: ANY|NOONE _ANY_ - for "Anyone" _NOONE_ - for "Executive isn't assigned"

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority, possible values: 0..10

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Task description

parameters.name: todo[]
parameters.description: Checkbox item Will be added to task description Combine several items to get checklist, example: `todo[]=case1&todo[]=case2`

parameters.name: datestart
parameters.description: Start date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: dateend
parameters.description: Due date or end date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: subscribe
parameters.description: User emails separated by commas, who will be subscribed to the task

parameters.name: hidden
parameters.description: User emails separated by commas, who will have access to this task, while it will be hidden for others

parameters.name: mention
parameters.description: User emails separated by commas, who will be mentioned at the end of the task description

parameters.name: max_time
parameters.description: Time estimates

parameters.name: max_money
parameters.description: Financial estimates

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma separated list of existing task tags You can specify names (if they are unique) or their IDs (can be obtained through _get_task_tags_ method)

data.name: Template prototype
data.text:

endpoints.name: search_tasks
endpoints.description: Returns tasks that meet search query

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: (Conditional) Project ID At least one of parameters required: _id_project, id_task, email_user_from, email_user_to, filter_

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: (Conditional) Task ID

parameters.name: email_user_from
parameters.description: (Conditional) Task author email

parameters.name: email_user_to
parameters.description: (Conditional) Task executive email

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: (Conditional) Search query (see description below) Integer fields: id=TASK_ID - returns particular task project=PROJECT_ID - returns tasks of a particular project parent=TASK_ID - returns subtasks of a particular parent task Equality and range operators for integer fields: =, in Example: `project = 2456`, `id in (1234, 1240)` String fields: name - task name Full or partial match for string fields: =, has Example: `name = 'Task Report'`, `name has 'Report'` Date fields: dateadd - task creation date in 'DD.MM.YYYY' format datestart - task start date in 'DD.MM.YYYY' format dateend - task due date or end date in 'DD.MM.YYYY' format dateclose - task closing date in 'DD.MM.YYYY' format Relational operators for date fields: >, <, >=, <=, ! =, = Example: `dateadd = '01.05.2021'` Query conditions can be combined with parentheses () and logical operations and, or (only in lowercase) Example filter query: `&filter=(name has 'Report' or name has 'Approval') and (dateend>'25.05.2021' and dateend<'31.05.2021')`

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Task state, possible values: active|done _active_ - incomplete tasks _done_ - completed tasks

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Additional task info, possible values (can be specified with commas): text|files _text_ or _html_ - description in text or html format _files_ - attached files info (in task description)

schema.message: At least one of fields required

endpoints.name: get_comments
endpoints.description: Returns comments of selected task

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: extra
parameters.description: Attached files info, possible value: files

endpoints.name: post_comment
endpoints.description: Creates comment in selected task _\*allows files attaching (see_ [details](https://worksection.com/en/faq/api-files.html#q1691)_)_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: (Conditional) Comment text At least one of parameters required: _text, todo_

parameters.name: todo[]
parameters.description: (Conditional) Checkbox item Combine several items to get checklist, example: `todo[]=case1&todo[]=case2`

parameters.name: email_user_from
parameters.description: Comment author email (will be set automatically if using access token)

parameters.name: hidden
parameters.description: User emails separated by commas, who will have access to this comment, while it will be hidden for others

parameters.name: mention
parameters.description: User emails separated by commas, who will be mentioned at the end of the comment

data.text:

endpoints.name: get_task_tags
endpoints.description: Returns task tags of all or selected group

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Group (tags of a particular group) You can specify the name of the group or its ID (can be obtained through the same method from the returned group parameter or through _get_task_tag_groups_ method)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Group type (tags of a particular group type), possible values: status|label

parameters.name: access
parameters.description: Tags with a particular visibility, possible values: public|private _public_ - available to all teams (including external client teams) _private_ - available only for your company teams

endpoints.name: add_task_tags
endpoints.description:
Creates task tags in selected group

_\*if there are no tags with the same name_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Group, where task tags will be created You can specify the name of the group or its ID (can be obtained through _get_task_tag_groups_ method)

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Task tag names separated by commas

endpoints.name: update_task_tags
endpoints.description: Sets new and removes previously set tags for selected task

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: plus
parameters.description: Task tags separated by commas, which will be added You can specify their names or IDs (can be obtained through _get_task_tags_ method)

parameters.name: minus
parameters.description: Task tags separated by commas, which will be removed

parameters.description: Group names separated by commas

endpoints.name: get_costs
endpoints.description: Returns individual costs added for selected or all tasks

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: Project ID (costs of all tasks of a particular project)

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID (costs of a particular task)

parameters.name: datestart
parameters.description: Start searching date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: dateend
parameters.description: End searching date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: is_timer
parameters.description: Time costs of particular type, possible values: 1|0 _1_ - received from the timer _0_ - entered manually

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Additional searching parameters (see description below) Integer fields: id=TASK_ID - returns costs of a particular task project=PROJECT_ID - returns costs on tasks of a particular project Equality and range operators for integer fields: =, in Example: `project = 2456`, `id in (1234, 1240)` String fields: comment - user comment to a separate cost line (String) Full or partial match for string fields: =, has Example: `comment = 'Monthly report'`, `comment has 'report'` Date fields: dateadd - date, when the costs were added in the 'DD.MM. YYYY' format Relational operators for date fields: >, <, >=, <=, ! =, = Example: `dateadd = '01.05.2021'` Query conditions can be combined with parentheses () and logical operations and, or (only in lowercase) Example filter query: `&filter=(comment has 'report' or comment has 'review') and (dateadd<'25.05.2021' and dateadd>'31.05.2021')`

endpoints.name: get_costs_total
endpoints.description: Returns total costs added for selected or all tasks

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: Project ID (costs of all tasks of a certain project)

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID (costs of a certain task)

parameters.name: datestart
parameters.description: Start searching date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: dateend
parameters.description: End searching date in DD.MM.YYYY format

parameters.name: is_timer
parameters.description: Time costs of particular type, possible values: 1|0 _1_ - received from the timer _0_ - entered manually

endpoints.name: add_costs
endpoints.description: Creates individual costs for selected task

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: (Conditional) Time costs in one of the following formats: 0.15 / 0,15 / 0:09 At least one of parameters required: _time, money_

parameters.name: money
parameters.description: (Conditional) Financial costs in account currency (if it needs to be specified without reference to an hourly rate)

parameters.name: is_rate
parameters.description: Financial costs are calculated on an hourly rate (money parameter is ignored), possible value: 1

parameters.name: email_user_from
parameters.description: Cost author email (required if using admin token; will be set automatically if using access token)

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Cost log comment

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Cost log date in 'DD.MM.YYYY' format

endpoints.name: update_costs
endpoints.description: Updates selected individual costs of task

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_costs
parameters.description: Cost ID Can be obtained through _get_costs_ method

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Time costs in one of the following formats: 0.15 / 0,15 / 0:09

parameters.name: money
parameters.description: Financial costs in account currency (if it needs to be specified without reference to an hourly rate)

parameters.name: is_rate
parameters.description: Financial costs are calculated on an hourly rate, if new time value is specified (money parameter is ignored), possible value: 1

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Cost log comment

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Cost log date in 'DD.MM.YYYY' format

endpoints.name: delete_costs
endpoints.description: Deletes selected individual costs of task

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_costs
parameters.description: Cost ID Can be obtained through _get_costs_ method

endpoints.name: get_timers
endpoints.description:
Returns running timers info

_\*their ID, start time, timer value and who started them_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

endpoints.name: stop_timer
endpoints.description: Stops and saves selected running timer

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: timer
parameters.description: Timer ID Can be obtained through _get_timers_ method

endpoints.name: get_my_timer
endpoints.description:
Returns authorized user's (oauth2) active timer

**!! User method (available only for access token) !!**

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

endpoints.name: start_my_timer
endpoints.description:
Starts authorized user's (oauth2) timer in selected task

**!! User method (available only for access token) !!**

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

endpoints.name: stop_my_timer
endpoints.description:
Stops and saves authorized user's (oauth2) active timer

**!! User method (only for access token) !!**

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Timer log comment

endpoints.name: get_files
endpoints.description:
Returns files list of selected project or task

_\*project files include attached to project description and directly to Files section  
\*task files include attached to task description and comments_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_project
parameters.description: Project ID Optional if Task ID selected

parameters.name: id_task
parameters.description: Task ID

endpoints.name: download
endpoints.description:
Downloads selected file

_\*attached to project description, task description, comment or directly to Files section_

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id_file
parameters.description: File ID Can be obtained through _get_files_ method

endpoints.name: get_webhooks
endpoints.description: Returns webhooks list

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

endpoints.name: add_webhook
endpoints.description: Creates webhook

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Webhook URL

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: Events separated by commas, possible values: post_task|post_comment|post_project|update_task|update_comment|update_project|delete_task|delete_comment|close_task Selected events will send notifications to Webhook URL

parameters.name: projects
parameters.description: Project IDs separated by commas If you want to limit the sending of events only for particular projects

parameters.name: http_user
parameters.description: Username (if using basic access authentication)

parameters.name: http_pass
parameters.description: Password (if using basic access authentication)

schema.message: Url should respond 200 HTTP_CODE and JSON {status:OK}

endpoints.name: delete_webhook
endpoints.description: Deletes selected webhook

authentication.note: Requires admin token or OAuth2 access token

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Webhook ID Can be obtained through _get_webhooks_ method
